intro: Coimbatore is Tamil Nadu's industrial powerhouse and a rapidly growing tech hub. Radhe packers and movers's 440+ verified vendors cover the entire city — from busy RS Puram to the growing Peelamedu and Saravanampatti tech corridors.
whyUs: Coimbatore's textile and IT industries drive constant relocation demand. Our vendors are highly experienced with both residential and corporate moves across the city.

faqs.q: Do you cover Saravanampatti and Peelamedu?
faqs.a: Yes — all tech and residential corridors including Saravanampatti, Peelamedu, Kalapatti and Vilankurichi are covered.

faqs.q: What does a local move cost in Coimbatore?
Do you move to Chennai and Bangalore?
faqs.a: Yes, inter-city moves with full GPS tracking and ₹5L insurance are available.
